creator: lylgood@foxmail.com
text:
Created attachment 224943
avoid the m been freed again

Bug File: sys/netpfil/ipfw/dn_sched_fq_pie.c

In function pie_enqueue, m is freed via m_freem() at line 737.
But the freed m is freed again via FREE_PKT() at line 751, which is a double free bug.

My patch returns the allocation error of m_tag_alloc() after m_freem(m), to avoid the m been freed again.
